description: Case style: Analogue watch, stainless steel round case with a fixed bezel that has crystal embellishmentDial style: White, mother of pearl textured dial with abstract patterns, silver toned hands, crystal detail on the hour marks from 12 to 6 and branding near the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap style: Pink, genuine leather strap with tang clasp closure and loops to hold the tail in placeWater resistance up to 10 metresComes in a signature Giordano caseWarranty: 2 year international warranty
